subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God, that Thou hast ordained this day as a festival unto the favoured among Thy servants and the sincere
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما جعلت هذا الیوم عیدا للمقربین من عبادک و المخلصین من
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
